reviews.review_msg: Simply one of the best profs! Takes lectures to another level, love her classes. If you care about your knowledge and skills, take her class.

EDUC 240 introduces many unfamiliar concepts, but she explains everything through stories and real examples, making ideas easy to remember. Despite the 150+ student lecture hall, everyone stays engaged through interactive activities and new platforms. Time flies in class. Professional, supportive, and provides great feedback. Excellent instructor!

Super professor! Tsoghik is one of those profs that you want to stay in her class till the last second. The way she engages everyone in discussion and debates, explains theories and perspectives in EDUC240 is amazing. She is very professional, knowledgeable and a wonderful human. I'll look forward to registering to her other sessions. Recommended!

Best prof ever!!! She knows her job, is professional, gives detailed feedback, classes are super helpful and informative, grades loyally, posts on time, comes on time, smiles and shows respect to everyone, encourages learning and thinking. Highly recommended!

Very prompt and professional. I didn't see her physically the course was online she was a ta for the course but she graded all assignments very well and answered emails same day. Will definitely take any class with her again.

I took EDUC 322 (Social lives of school children course), and she graded so fairly and gave such good feedback about important concepts. Also, the grade and feedback she gives is almost immediate and so you know what to expect and how to improve for the next assignment. That course was online but heavy. She is a professional in her job.

I honestly feel like I've learned a lot already. She explains everything clearly and breaks down the writing in a way that actually makes sense. She also uses technology in class, which makes things more interactive and fun, not just a regular lecture. The expectations are clear, the feedback is helpful. I can already see improvement in my writing.
